description: Sarge, May, and Daisy witness the beginning of the Shrike tower's construction from gathered infected hosts in a field. Sarge explains the dire threat: if the tower isn't destroyed in time, it will unleash a swarm that will consume the planet. Communication is made with Mack, who seeks solutions from the Zephyr.

transcript.line: But every time we get close, she slips away... vanishes. Chronyca-2 was the closest we came to stopping her. We took out her crew, we had her trapped... and then she was gone. We have no idea how.
After you destroyed the planet?
We didn't destroy it. By the time we got there, it had already begun. But this time, we're one step ahead. We can keep it from happening here.
What's her motive?
Hatred. For all living things.
What's yours?
Love. No, it's hate. That's my thing, too. Hate and revenge. She took my family from me. I won't stop until she pays for that.
Well, if she's that powerful, how can you kill her?
There's only one way to kill the beast.
A galaxy hopping hate-beast that eats planets, and you want to defeat her with a, um, sword?
It's sharp. Feel it.
I don't buy it. What aren't you telling us?
What aren't you telling me?
There it is. Hacker, huh?
It's starting.
What's starting?
The end.
That's why I was killing the Shrike. To keep them from making that tower. If we don't destroy it before the monster arrives, it'll grow 10 times that size. Then it's too late.
How does it work?
They're drawing their power from the Earth. When it's done, it will erupt into a swarm of those things, spreading across the planet, swallowing everything. Then the planet dies.
Want to call Mack and tell him the good news?
How do we stop this? We're trying to get a visual. I want to see what this thing looks like.
It's growing, Mack. I don't like this.
Until this beast woman appears, everyone should sit tight.
Well, Benson gave us some information that might help us understand her. Has Sarge shared how he plans to take her out?
It's unclear... but it may or may not involve a magical sword.
Sir, there's a large, unidentified object approaching Earth's atmosphere. It seems to be headed toward the rendezvous point.
It's probably her. I'll let Sarge know.
All right, try to make contact with that spacecraft.
